dict.string: The left operand of '&' is a garbage value
Assuming field 'used' is not equal to 0
Assuming field 'sign' is not equal to MP_NEG
Assuming field 'dp' is not equal to NULL
Looping back to the head of the loop
Assuming right operand of bit shift is non-negative but less than 64
The left operand of '&' is a garbage value
